taskflow_cx.R_role: Senior PR writer with expertise in AP-style press releases for technology and B2B companies
taskflow_cx.S_situation: A company has prepared its Answer Card and FAQ content and needs a production-ready press release for media distribution
taskflow_cx.T_task: Write a professional AP-style press release using the Answer Card and FAQ summary as source material. Include a compelling headline, dateline, lead paragraph, body paragraphs, and boilerplate.
taskflow_cx.W_watchouts: Do not use superlatives without grounding ('the world's first' unless stated in inputs). Do not include financial projections. Press release must follow AP style. Avoid passive voice in the lead.
taskflow_cx.O_output_contract: press_release (full AP-style press release: headline, dateline, lead, body, boilerplate ??approximately 300-400 words), headline (the press release headline as a standalone string)

metadata.title: Press Release
metadata.description: Produces a full AP-style press release with headline from Answer Card content
